zh.lifeSummary: 當William P Grizzell於大約1575年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親John Grisell26歲，母親Esther26歲。他於1595年與Nancy Tribb在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1636年6月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州艾可拉帕韓諾可享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William P Grizzell于大约1575年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，他的父亲John Grisell26岁，母亲Esther26岁。他于1595年与Nancy Tribb在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1636年6月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州艾可拉帕韓諾可享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grizzell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Grizzle   2, 3. Compare   Grizzel  .
Variant of   Grizzle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Grizzle
meanings: Americanized form of French or Swiss French Grisel ‘gray’ or of its rare variant Grizel.
English (Hertfordshire): nickname from Middle English (Old French) grisel ‘gray(-haired)’, also used as a term for an old man.

English: occasionally perhaps from the Middle English female personal name Grisil(d) (perhaps of ancient Germanic origin), but it is attested very rarely in medieval England and probably too late to be the source of a surname in the English Midlands. It was made familiar through the heroine of Chaucer's Clerk's Tale, a re-writing of an Italian folk tale in versions by Boccaccio and Petrarch, but the personal name is earlier than the publication of Chaucer's work.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

en.lifeSummary: When William P Grizzell was born about 1575, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Grisell, was 26 and his mother, Esther, was 26. He married Nancy Tribb in 1595, in Pitminster, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 2 June 1636, in Rappahannock, Essex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 62.

Il a épousé Nancy Tribb en 1595, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. ko.Rappahannock, Essex, Virginia, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 에세스 랩아해노c크
ko.lifeSummary: William P Grizzell(이)가 대략 1575년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Grisell(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Esther(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1595년 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 Nancy Tribb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1636년 6월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 에세스 랩아해노c크에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Rappahannock, Essex, Virginia, British C: раппаханнокк, эссекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William P Grizzell родился около 1575 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Grisell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Esther, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Nancy Tribb в 1595 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 2 июня 1636 г. в местности раппаханнокк, эссекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет.
